cycles.name: outreach-conversion
cycles.measurement: Check Google Calendar for new bookings via https://calendar.app.google/5hcxx2tWmVkNvS1c6 (booked meetings) and search Gmail for replies to outreach emails sent in the past 72h. Score = (booked meetings * 10) + (email replies * 1). Higher is better.

cycles.name: reply_rate_by_hook_structure
cycles.measurement: Query event log: reply_received / email_sent grouped by hook_variant x structure_variant, rolling 14d window. Score = reply_rate per cell (0.0-1.0). Higher is better.
